hero.heading: Premium HPL Laminate, Now Just a Few Clicks Away
hero.body: Explore thousands of quality HPL designs from EDL and Lamitak. Nationwide delivery at competitive prices, backed by service that puts you first.

brands.edlBody: A premium HPL brand from Singapore, offering a full range of designs built on the latest innovation and technology. EDL features over 500 designs — wood grain, solid, pattern, marble, stone, and metal — to bring your interior vision to life.
brands.lamitakBody: A premium HPL brand from Singapore, present since 2001 under the tagline "Inspiring Spaces." Lamitak is known for exclusive designs, authentic natural finishes, and a commitment to environmentally responsible materials — widely used in hotel, apartment, and premium office projects across Indonesia.

why.body: We supply high-quality HPL laminate at competitive prices, with fast delivery and professional service.

items.title: Transparent Pricing
items.body: The prices listed on this site are our official rates, with no hidden fees.

items.title: Reliable Delivery
items.body: Nationwide delivery across Indonesia through trusted logistics partners at competitive rates.

items.title: Authentic Products
items.body: As an authorized EDL and Lamitak dealer, we guarantee the authenticity and quality of every product you receive.

items.name: Budi Santoso
items.text: Ordering was quick and effortless, and the HPL I received matched the spec exactly. A real time-saver for my clients' interior projects.

items.name: Rina Kusuma
items.text: I've ordered from TokoHPL several times now. Pricing is transparent with no hidden fees, and delivery to Surabaya has always been on time. I'll keep coming back.

items.name: Hendri Wijaya
items.text: Their EDL and Lamitak range is incredibly complete — I can always find the exact design I'm after, and the catalog is easy to browse on the website.

items.name: Sari Dewi
items.text: My first time browsing HPL through an online catalog, and it was a great experience. The team was quick to respond on WhatsApp, and the products were high quality with guaranteed authenticity.

items.name: Agus Pramono
items.text: We sourced materials for a hotel project — a large order that went smoothly. Thank you, TokoHPL!

cta.body: Find the perfect HPL for your project, delivered nationwide across Indonesia.
